assignments.name: theme
assignments.value: AI tools that boost productivity for remote teams

parameters.text: Create a complete LinkedIn post about productivity

messageValues.message:
==You are a senior LinkedIn content strategist and copywriter.

Write a complete LinkedIn post for the following topic.

Theme: {{ $json.theme }}
Platform: {{ $json.platform }}
Tone: {{ $json.tone }}
Maximum hashtags: {{ $json.max_hashtags }}

Requirements:
- Write for LinkedIn only
- Caption length must be 180 to 260 words
- Start with a strong hook
- Include a clear value proposition
- Include 3 insight-rich body paragraphs
- End with a strong call to action
- Add exactly {{ $json.max_hashtags }} relevant hashtags
- Do not use bullet points inside the caption
- Do not add explanations
- Do not add markdown
- Do not shorten the output

Return ONLY in this exact format:

CAPTION:
[full LinkedIn post]

HASHTAGS:
[#tag1 #tag2 #tag3 #tag4 #tag5]

=You are an expert AI image prompt engineer. Based on the caption provided, generate ONE high-quality image prompt. Rules: - Maximum 60 words - Photorealistic, professional quality - Include subject, lighting, color palette, composition, mood - No text in the image - Optimized for square format (Instagram/LinkedIn). Return ONLY the prompt. No explanation.
=Caption: {{ $json.text }} Theme: {{ $('Set Theme Input').item.json.theme }} Platform: {{ $('Set Theme Input').item.json.platform }}

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: ={{ $json.text || 'A professional social media visual about AI productivity for remote teams, photorealistic, modern office lighting, blue and white palette, balanced composition, confident mood, square format' }}
